further_reading.title: NIST AI RMF: Generative AI Profile
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful for the module's emphasis on verification, responsibility, and trustworthy use of generative AI.

further_reading.title: OECD.AI: Generative AI Issues
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides a beginner-friendly overview of common benefits, limitations, and risks that support the module's judgment-first framing.

notes: The module is primarily pedagogical guidance and contains no hard factual claims that require inline citations under the stated rules: no statistics, incidents, standards-by-name, vendor/version capability claims, pricing, or named historical events.
